LightningComponentBundle.description: Runs data-driven program eligibility (age/income). On Case pages uses Case.Account; on Flow Screens pass Case Id and optionally Participant Account Id (e.g. after Add Participant).

property.name: recordId
property.label: Case Id
property.description: The Case record Id (for context and default Account when participant is not passed).

property.name: clientAccountId
property.label: Participant Account Id (optional)
property.description: Person Account Id from Add Participant (or similar). When set, overrides Case.Account for the eligibility check.
